notes: PG-182 hardening complete. Final reconciliation 2026-04-15: (1) stale DataTable reference removed from spec/plan — TagsTab renders plain card rows, never claimed to use DataTable at runtime; (2) artifact hashes recomputed across all 7 touched files (contact-automation.ts + contact.router.ts changed during PG-195 PhoneNumber fix + contact-automation.test undefined-in-update regression; packages/db/src/index.ts extended to export the 4 Contact settings Prisma types); (3) Build gate reran clean after removing a stale .next/lock file left by an earlier aborted build — issue was build infrastructure, not PG-182 code. All 5 audit findings + 4 residual concerns + PG-195 typecheck spillover resolved. Automation toggles wired: 4 (normalizePhoneNumbers, autoCapitalizeNames, preventDeleteWithOpenDeals, restrictTagCreationToAdmins) + ContactRequiredField enforcement on contact.create/update. 3 automation toggles + 5 AI toggles remain as tracked follow-ups in IFC-310/311/312 (each broadened 2026-04-14 to cover both contacts and accounts). Module-settings playbook at docs/planning/module-settings-playbook.md codifies the full hardening checklist for PG-184+.

validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators typecheck && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web typecheck

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators test --run && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api test --run && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web test --run contact-settings

kpi_results.name: Total tests passing (validators + api + web, contact-settings scope)
kpi_results.actual: 84 (validators 20 + api 44 + web 20) — of which 33 are net-new vs. the pre-audit delivery
